body_txt: As You Know , humans cannot breathe water, so drowning is both painful and frightening. Torturers will therefore sometimes use water as an instrument of torture. There are three typical ways this is done: The obvious disadvantage of this method of torture is that it's more than possible for an inept torturer to accidentally kill the victim rather than make them talk. See also Electric Torture for another common tool of torture. Compare Swirlie , which is a variant of the ducking method typically done by school bullies with a toilet. May overlap with Drowning Pit . This can be a form of Sinister Suffocation .
